Package LeidenUniv.Tools

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    Adaptive_Watershed
    Does adaptive watershedding based on the find maxima threshold
    Auto_Lut_Color
    Automatically adapts LUT based on the image histogram
    BinaryReconstruct_
    Binary reconstruction, by G.Landini.
    Bleach_CorrectionJW
    Plugin for leveling the total intensities of the imagestack Allows to correct on a ROI as well
    Combine_Overlapping_ROIs
    Combines rois in a 3D stack based on overlap in consecutive slices
    create3DRoiGroups
    Used by the combining of overlapping rois, creates an arraylist of int arrays, where these int are the indices of connected rois
    Depth_Based_ZProject
    Plugin for creating a depth encoded z-projection where the intensity relates to the depth in the image
    drawTillEnd_
    Plugin for drawing in an overlay element from current frame till the last one Useful for making movies with arrows
    ExtracellularBacterialBurden  
    ExtracellularBacterialBurden2D  
    FindNeighbours
    For combining a Roi array that overlaps in postions over a z-stack into groups of rois
    getPieInformation  
    getWekaProbability  
    Grey_Skeleton
    A plugin for making a grey scale skeleton of monochromatic images
    HeatMap_
    Makes a Z-projection heatmap
    ImageHistogram
    get the imae histogram as int array
    IntensityDirection  
    Kymogramsv2_
    A tool for making kymograms on the current z-slice and channel
    Line_Analysis
    Tool for analysing multiple lines
    Local_Maxima_stack  
    minimumRadialAlign  
    MinMaxContrast  
    MultiSurf  
    ObjectCounter4D_
    Counts the number of 3d objects over time
    pearsonTable  
    PI_Hoechst_Measurements  
    Polar_Circularity
    Plugin for measuring the polar circularity on a ROI Based on Stojmenovic M, Jevremovic A, Nayak A (2013) Fast iris detection via shape based circularity.
    pPos
    pixel position and value
    quantifyPollen  
    RadialTransform  
    readScaleMZ16  
    readXMLAttribute  
    RedGreenRatio  
    RGB_cube  
    Roi_Symmetry
    Plugin for measuring the symmetry of a ROI Based on Willemse et al 2020 Mathematical Mirroring
    Segmented_line_lengths
    Measures subsections of a polygon line
    Special_Threshold
    This plugin is created by Joost Willemse @ leiden University It can be used to threshold images on other factors than just intensity It basically applies a filter to the image and allows you to set the threshold on that filtered image without needing to see the intermediate
    SproutAnalyzerLeiden
    Sprout segmentation plugin
    Subaveraging_of_stacks
    For subaveraging of stacks
    Test  
    TimeProjector3D_
    Instead of doing a z-projection this makes a max intensity t-projection of your images
    Warhol  
    xyPos
    pixel position
    ZProject_BuildUp
    To create a one by one max projection build up, useful for making movies of your stack
